rationale: Surface shape: CWE-787 unbounded memcpy into a fixed 128B stack buffer. Gated by `capable(CAP_SYS_ADMIN)`. ns_capable is namespace-scoped; an unprivileged user can create their own userns and self-grant CAP_SYS_ADMIN inside it. Memory-corruption reachable via ns_capable IS a privilege escalation. Axis-4 (capability_check) detects the cap call site. Verdict falls through to UNCERTAIN (no other axis fires).
